description: Capability for the companion window. Receives game-started/game-stopped/schema-resolved events; can show/hide/move/resize itself; supports custom drag region for borderless chrome (D-13). Phase 4 gap closure 04-11: shell:allow-open scoped to two GitHub URLs for the UpdateModal release-notes link (UpdateModal renders inside companion per main-companion.tsx). Update this allowlist whenever a new external link is added to the companion window.
